variants: Vincent Ng has a strong foundation in education, having graduated from Albatross Bay Academy. He currently serves as the Manager for Sprout Street Learning Pod, where he focuses on enhancing learning experiences for children in the community. Born in Willowfell Outskirts, Vincent works at Heathermoor Holdings, where he employs his skills, including proficiency in the Divehi script. His dedication to civic responsibility extends beyond his career, as he actively volunteers to support educational initiatives in the area.
